title: Tornado Intercept Lib (itrcpttools)
description: Support mod for Tornado Intercept for versions 1.3.3 and above
body:
# Overview

A support mod for [Tornado Intercept](https://modrinth.com/mod/tornado-intercept), for versions 1.3.3 and above of the mod. It is needed because it holds all the code which contains the wind reading system, deployment system, config and overall all Tornado Intercept's important features. Without this tool, the main mod will not function properly. 

Wind speed in the vehicle cannot be read without this tool.

This tool is currently only for PM Weather and not for Weather2.

## Config

The library adds a config under esc menu/mods/Tornado Intercept Tools/config/server settings. There, the wind threshold for deployed and undeployed vehicle can be set in miles per hour.
![Server config for intercept vehicles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8e3aba94a7855c7da8f1596afec48e7bb5ef48d.png)
![Client config for the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efdf4fa9961b25c7d8583d301a5068f5fab6db98.png)
